title: Settleway - The Safer Way to Settle Real-World Trade
bodyTextSample: Settleway Marketplace How It Works Trust & Settlement Login Bilateral trade assurance on Stellar Testnet Trade with commitment on both sides. Discover supply and demand, negotiate commercial terms, secure buyer principal and bilateral bonds, verify delivery, and preserve settlement proof on Stellar. Explore Marketplace See How It Works BUYER ASSURANCE Pre-lock intent Principal + commitment bond The buyer prepares purchase value and a seriousness bond before escrow can lock. Buyer principal Buyer bond SELLER ASSURANCE Performance bond The seller commits delivery seriousness before protected execution begins. Mutual terms gate Commercial terms locked by both sides Evidence verification Stellar-backed settlement ONE CONNECTED TRADE WORKSPACE Every serious step belongs to the same transaction story. Discover Supply Compare agricultural lots, origin, quantity, price, and seller confidence. Post Buyer Demand Signal verified purchasing intent before a protected room opens. Negotiate Terms Keep price, quantity, delivery, and evidence expectations in one recorded thread. Secure Commitments Buyer principal and bilateral bonds create visible seriousness on both sides. Verify Delivery Evidence hashes and room milestones preserve the execution story. Settle on Stellar Testnet references support inspectable funding, lock, refund, and settlement proof. THE PRODUCT MECHANISM A corridor designed to slow down the risky moments. Discovery stays open. Commercial terms become explicit. Funding begins only after mutual commitment. Evidence and settlement remain part of the same room. 1 Discover 2 Negotiate 3 Both Commit 4 Verify 5 Settle BILATERAL ASSURANCE Capital, commitment, evidence, and outcome remain legible. Buyer principal 100% protected deal value Buyer commitment bond 5% seriousness signal Seller performance bond 5% delivery commitment Platform fee 0.5% per party where applicable Deterministic settlement Successful completion returns both bonds, routes principal to the seller,

This lot is already sorted and ready for buyer review, pickup coordination, or delivery scheduling. Buyers should use the recorded negotiation to confirm final quantity, price, grading expectations, packaging, delivery handoff, and the product photos or documents that should be attached before the protected Deal Room opens. Seller notes are part of pre-deal context. Final commercial terms must still be confirmed through Submit Offer and the recorded negotiation thread. What to clarify next Quality grade and sorting tolerance Delivery timing and handoff location Photos, receipts, or quality documents Recorded negotiation is the first gate Buyers and sellers discuss price, quantity, delivery, quality, and evidence before any deposit or escrow action begins. title: Settleway - The Safer Way to Settle Real-World Trade
bodyTextSample: Settleway Buy Sell Deals SS Guided founder demo corridor Run the Settleway story from trade discovery to verified reputation. This is the operator cockpit for the hackathon presentation. It keeps the narrative disciplined: show the trade problem, show negotiation before money, show mutual commitment, show protected settlement, then close with reputation. Recorded negotiation first Two user-facing rails Stellar-backed trust references Demo Controls Reset Demo State QUICK JUMPS Landing Page Marketplace (Buy) Chili Listing Detail Notifications Negotiation Thread Active Deal Room Seller Profile Start From Landing Page SCENARIO Commodity: Red chili / bird's eye chili Seller: Probolinggo Chili Supplier Buyer: Surabaya Restaurant Group IDR 20,000,000 deal value MVP PROVES Product does not jump from listing to escrow. Negotiation and mutual commitment happen before deposits. Settlement references and reputation belong to one trust story. HONESTY BOUNDARIES Local-bank funding remains simulated in this MVP. Stellar is used as a trust layer and proof surface, not as a user-hostile crypto interface. Dispute judgment is not fully automated; the product preserves evidence and chronology for review. Presentation Route 01 Frame the trust problem Start on the landing page and explain why agricultural trade needs more than listings and chat screenshots. 02 Prove discovery is real Open the marketplace, choose the chili listing, and show that counterparties can inspect credibility before they commit. 03 Show negotiation before money Use Submit Offer to explain that negotiation becomes part of the evidence trail before the protected room opens. 04 Activate the room together Switch roles and show that Open Deal Room is mutual commitment, not a one-sided shortcut into escrow. 05 Walk through funding and lock Show the buyer and seller obligations, the dual-rail story, and how the lock becomes part of the Stellar-backed trail. 06 Close with proof and reputation Finish with delivery evidence
